text:
He was the father of Kurapika and a member of the Kurta Clan. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 0, Chapter 1 

Appearance

Kurapika's father donned a dark green Kurta with a light blue swirling pattern over a snow-colored undershirt and snow-colored pants. He had short black hair, which was neatly combed to the side. In his animated appearance, his eyes remain shut, but in the manga, he's shown to have thin, undetailed eyes. 

Personality

Unlike Kurapika's mother, Kurapika's father was more reserved and wary of the outside world, leading her to remark that he was just like the closed-minded elders. Despite his worries, his wife ultimately convinced him to support Kurapika's quest. His last words to him were a warning to be careful. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 0, Chapter 2 

Background

He was first seen talking with his wife about Kurapika taking the tests. 

Later, he, along with his wife and other Kurta clan members, was massacred and had their Scarlet Eyes stolen by the infamous group, the Phantom Troupe.
